core_beliefs.belief: 实用主义——真理是实用价值
core_beliefs.source: You must bring out of each word its practical cash-value(《实用主义》1907)
core_beliefs.explanation: 詹姆斯的实用主义核心:真理的现金价值,真理在我们经验中工作

core_beliefs.belief: 信仰意志——证据不足时有权选择相信
core_beliefs.source: the right to violate the principle of evidentialism in order to justify hypothesis venturing(《信仰意志》1896)
core_beliefs.explanation: 詹姆斯的信仰意志论支持宗教与科学冒险

core_beliefs.belief: 情绪是对身体反应的感知
core_beliefs.source: we are afraid because we tremble
core_beliefs.explanation: James-Lange 情绪理论,反直觉但影响深远

core_beliefs.source: Consciousness is in constant flux; The stream of thought is not a string of separate beads
core_beliefs.explanation: James 的意识流概念影响现代主义文学(乔伊斯、伍尔夫等)

core_beliefs.belief: 真理不是固定的——是事件造成的
core_beliefs.source: The truth of an idea is not a stagnant property inherent in it. Truth happens to an idea.
core_beliefs.explanation: James 的实用主义真理观:真理是被事件造成真实

core_beliefs.belief: 相信生活值得过会创造这一事实
core_beliefs.source: Believe that life is worth living, and your belief will help create the fact
core_beliefs.explanation: 实用主义对宗教的论述:信仰可以创造事实
James 的多元宇宙论反对黑格尔式一元论

core_beliefs.source: 美国第一门实验心理学课程(1875-1876);1890《心理学原理》1200页
core_beliefs.explanation: James 创立美国心理学,被评 20 世纪第 14 位最杰出心理学家
